articles.author: Ivan Mehta
articles.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations - TechCrunch
articles.description: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.
articles.content: OpenAI today released new conversational models, called GPT-Live-1 and GPT-Live-1 mini, claiming that they sound more natural and can handle turn-taking better. These are full-duplex models, meaning … [+3550 chars]

articles.author: Ram Iyer
articles.title: Blue Origin reportedly raising $10B at $130B valuation - TechCrunch
articles.description: Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from Coatue Asset Management, Bezos himself, and other big-name investors, The New York Times reported.
articles.content: Billionaire Jeff Bezos’ space rocket company Blue Origin is raising $10 billion at a $130 billion pre-money valuation from Coatue Asset Management, Bezos himself, and other large investors, The New Y… [+1515 chars]
